arts.ttl: Inter (7) 4-3 (6) Barcelona: Best stats from thrilling Champions League semi-final
arts.sum: A selection of stats to explain where Inter Milan's extraordinary Champions League semi-final with Barcelona was won and lost.

arts.ttl: Inter (7) 4-3 (6) Barcelona: Davide Frattesi, Lautaro Martinez speak of fluctuating emotions during astonishing victory
arts.sum: Davide Frattesi admits he almost "blacked out" after netting the winning the goal against Barcelona at San Siro in the Champions League this evening.

arts.ttl: 'Thank you Inter & Barca' - the game nobody wanted to end
arts.sum: Thirteen goals, countless comebacks and a whole mountain of chaos - Inter's win over Barcelona will go down as a Champions League classic.

arts.ttl: Inter Milan Emerge Victorious Over Barcelona: Takeaways From One of the Greatest Ever Champions League Semifinals
arts.sum: Inter Milan and Barcelona put on a show in the Champions League semifinals, with the Italians narrowly defeating the Catalans and advancing to the final.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer sums up Inter vs Barcelona perfectly after Champions League thriller
arts.sum: Inter Milan and Barcelona played out one of the best ever Champions League semi-finals, with the Italian giants eventually securing a 7-6 win on aggregate over Hansi Flick's side

arts.ttl: Inter Milan, Barcelona write new chapter in UCL folklore
arts.athr: Sam Marsden and Gab Marcotti and Graham Hunter
arts.sum: Amazing goals, dazzling skill and drama at every turn: Inter's 7-6 aggregate defeat of Barça will go down as one of the Champions League's greatest-ever set of games.

arts.ttl: Inter (7) 4-3 (6) Barcelona: Raphinha equals impressive Cristiano Ronaldo record despite defeat in Milan
arts.sum: Raphinha equals one of Cristiano Ronaldo's many Champions League records with his goal against Inter Milan at San Siro this evening.
